---
title: "Introduction"
author: "Frederick De Baene"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Introduction

This page serves as an introduction to different concepts and terms in
statistics.

# Population

The population is the complete set of elements in which we are interested and on
which we want to learn something. These elements can be individuals or objects.
We want to learn something about the characteristics of this population, and we
do this by observing the characteristics of the individual elements of the
population.
